spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID

cards.ai_panel: bg-[#0B1521] border border-cyan-900/50 text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.15)] rounded-lg

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A2540] text-white hover:bg-[#0F365A] rounded-md transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.ai_action: bg-cyan-700 text-white hover:bg-cyan-600 rounded-md transition-colors shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(6,182,212,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md transition-colors

badges.ai_confidence: bg-cyan-950 text-cyan-400 border border-cyan-800 text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full flex items-center gap-1
badges.status_clear: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full
badges.status_disputed: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200 text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full

login.layout: Split screen. Left: Full-screen background image of Mumbai with a heavy #0A2540/80 overlay. Right: Solid white panel.

dashboard.layout: Dense Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6).
elements: KPI Widgets (col-span-3): Active Projects, Documents Uploaded, Titles Cleared, Pending Legal Review
AI Confidence Meter (col-span-4, dark AI panel styling)

project_workspace.layout: 3-panel view (col-span-3 list, col-span-6 central viewer, col-span-3 AI summary).
elements: Document Viewer with OCR text & ownership chain timeline (Center)
AI Validation Summary with risk flags (Right - dark styling)

rag_pipeline.layout: Horizontal flow container spanning full width.
elements: Nodes: Upload -> OCR -> Metadata -> Chunking -> Embeddings -> Yavi.ai Vector Store -> Semantic Search -> AI Decision
Use animated data lines (framer-motion or CSS SVGs) connecting nodes
Abstract data background image with low opacity

ai_chatbot.layout: Floating chat interface or dedicated right panel (col-span-4).
elements: Message bubbles with citations & source document links
Gov API Cards (MahaBhulekh, UIDAI, PAN, Property Reg) with pulsing status indicators

image_urls.description: Bandra Worli Sea Link at Golden Hour

motion.pipeline_animation: react-fast-marquee or framer-motion for glowing data line flows

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install custom fonts: Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind CSS for layout structure. Heavily customize Shadcn components for interactive logic (Forms, Modals, Inputs).
Never use native <input> or <select>. Use Shadcn Input, Select, Form.
Implement the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype but tailored for Indian GovTech (deep navy + teal/cyan accents).
Use the dark AI panel styling (bg-[#0B1521] + cyan border/glow) specifically for RAG/Yavi.ai components to distinguish AI insights from standard government data.
Ensure the layout feels 'investor-ready' and premium. Don't crowd elements, use generous padding (p-6/p-8) on cards.
Implement the 6 requested screens and link them via a common navigation header or sidebar.
Use Lucide-React icons heavily for visual indicators.
Integrate the provided Unsplash images for the login background, pipeline background, and document placeholders.
